g.text: Per-cycle history is durable: every cycle
keeps its own folder, so any past cycle's
Viewer has no PlantUML engine; it only
consumes pre-rendered SVG. Every tree's path
Owns the cycle boundary. No standalone
open / snapshot before / close / snapshot after / write diff puml
enumerate full tree set (Project, single source)
tree rail + Diagram/List diff + description card
